creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-02-12 22:45:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/pear-Validate_AU Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  A PEAR data validation class for Australia. The package includes phone number,
  postal code, tax file number, Australian business number, Australian company
  number and Australian regional codes validation.
  
  WWW:    http://pear.php.net/package/Validate_AU/
  
  PR:             ports/120003
  Submitted by:   Ditesh Shashikant Gathani <ditesh at gathani.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2978    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/devel/pear-Validate_AU/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/pear-Validate_AU/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/pear-Validate_AU/pkg-descr (new)
